use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PARKINSONISM THAT MAY FOLLOW CARBON MONOXIDE INTOXICATION
TREATMENT OF PARKINSONISM THAT MAY FOLLOW MANGANESE INTOXICATION

indications.text:
CREXONT is indicated for the treatment of Parkinson's disease, post-encephalitic parkinsonism, and
parkinsonism that may follow carbon monoxide intoxication or manganese intoxication in adults.
